title: Fillet of Beef on Bruschetta
ingredients: Beef tenderloin, cooked rare and thinly sliced (I use Boar’s head rare roast beef)
Make herb butter by placing herbs in food processor and pulse, then add softened butter until well combined.
To serve, spread butter on baguette slices, toast lightly under broiler. Top each baguette slice with slice of beef and watercress.
